title: PhD
biography: Oliver Smithies was a British-American geneticist who developed gene targeting to create knockout mice and invented gel electrophoresis. Nobel Prize 2007.
aiSummary: Oliver Smithies is a genetics specialist at University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill. Based in Chapel Hill.
techniquesInvented: Gene targeting in embryonic stem cells
